reasoning_model_1: The model failed significantly on Content Accuracy. reasoning_model_2: The model followed the command perfectly. The Content Accuracy is 100%, matching the script '这个方案，好，我们通过了' exactly without additions or omissions. model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 hallucinated extra words ('再好') at the beginning of the sentence, violating the strict content accuracy requirement.
